description: An application provider that can be used to connect an AWS managed application or customer managed application to IAM Identity Center.

ApplicationProviderArn.description: The ARN of the application provider.
ApplicationProviderArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the application provider.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 10  
Maximum Length: 1224  
Pattern: ^arn:aws(-[a-z]{1,5}){0,3}:sso::aws:applicationProvider/[a-zA-Z0-9-/]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

FederationProtocol.description: The protocol used to federate to the application provider.
FederationProtocol.markdownDescription:
The protocol used to federate to the application provider.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: SAML | OAUTH  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

DisplayData.description: A structure that describes how IAM Identity Center represents the application provider in the portal.

DisplayName.description: The name of the application provider that appears in the portal.
DisplayName.markdownDescription:
The name of the application provider that appears in the portal.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 100  
Update requires: No interruption

IconUrl.description: A URL that points to an icon that represents the application provider.
IconUrl.markdownDescription:
A URL that points to an icon that represents the application provider.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 768  
Pattern: ^(http|https):\/\/.*$  
Update requires: No interruption

Description.description: The description of the application provider that appears in the portal.
Description.markdownDescription:
The description of the application provider that appears in the portal.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

A structure that describes how IAM Identity Center represents the application provider in the portal.
